{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember James C. Ramos was awarded the 'Legislator of the Year' by the California Nations Indian Gaming Association and the California Alliance of Child and Family Services.",
    "Ramos has founded and chaired the California Legislative Native American Caucus.",
    "Ramos authored legislation requiring California schools to teach about Native American tribes' history and culture.",
    "The criteria for the 'Legislator of the Year' award includes courage in defending Indian people and their interests, dedication to tribal sovereignty, and excellence in educating on tribal issues.",
    "In 2024, Ramos authored AB 2711, which establishes a public health framework for identifying and referring youth with substance use needs to community-based services.",
    "AB 2711 was signed into law in September 2024.",
    "Ramos's leadership has been pivotal in advancing policies that strengthen the public behavioral health system."
